heading: Request Support
body:
- Click the in-app chat icon in the lower right corner to chat
  with a MongoDB Support representative.

- To view Developer Resources:

  In Atlas, go to the Project Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select the organization that
    contains your desired project from the Organizations menu in the
    navigation bar.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired project
    from the Projects menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View docs.

  The MongoDB Documentation page displays.
